html:
Exclusive to:  

The Volt Goat Horn is an Item with a 25% chance to be dropped by Volt Goats in the Reign of Giants DLC. It is an ingredient for crafting the Morning Star and the Weather Pain, making Volt Goats a worthwhile Mob to farm.

×10

"lightninggoathorn"
“It's like a miniature lightning rod.”
–Wilson
“I can hear the lightning if I hold it to my ear.”
–Willow
“Tiny lightning bone.”
–Wolfgang
“A weird curling horn.”
–Wendy
“THIS IS A GOOD HORN”
–WX-78
“There must be something unnatural in the horn.”
–Wickerbottom
“Your horn is mine.”
–Woodie
“It'd make a nice horn.”
–Maxwell
“No wire within. How does it hold a charge?”
–Wagstaff
“This cöuld deal a lasting blöw.”
–Wigfrid
“This might make a good weapon.”
–Webber
“I feel a little bad about the dead goat.”
–Walani
“For kabobs, perhaps?”
–Warly
“Looks good fer hittin' stuff.”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS HORN LIKE PIG BOTTOM”
–Wilba
“From Twirly Branch Head”
–Wormwood
“I guess I could poke something with it.”
–Wheeler
“It's even more interesting up close.”
–Winona
“It's okay.”
–Wortox
“Crackly!”
–Wurt
“The goat gave me a souvenir.”
–Walter
“Twisty, like time itself.”
–Wanda
The Volt Goat Horn is an Item with a 25% chance to be dropped by Volt Goats in the Reign of Giants DLC. It is an ingredient for crafting the Morning Star and the Weather Pain, making Volt Goats a worthwhile Mob to farm.

The '''Volt Goat Horn''' is an [[Item]] with a 25% chance to be dropped by [[Volt Goat]]s in the ''[[Reign of Giants]]'' DLC. It is an ingredient for crafting the [[Morning Star]] and the [[Weather Pain]], making Volt Goats a worthwhile [[Mob]] to farm.

=={{pic|32|Icon Tools}} Usage==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Volt Goat Horn
|item2 = Electrical Doodad
|count2 = 2
|item3 = Nitre
|count3 = 2
|tool = Alchemy Engine
|result = Morning Star}}

|tool = Alchemy Engine
|result = Weather Pain}}
